periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a low around 74. Southwest wind around 17 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

periods.name: Wednesday
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 86. Southwest wind 13 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

periods.name: Wednesday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Cloudy, with a low around 70. West wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between 2 and 3 inches possible.

periods.name: Thursday
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 78. North wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.
